task_completion.description: Create a new demand file named pedestrians.rou.xml containing at least 10 persons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the contents of /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pedestrians.rou.xml (e.g., via cat, nano, or vim) with at least 10 distinct <person> elements defined.

task_completion.description: Define multi-stage trips for the persons: walking, riding the bus, and walking to a final destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of pedestrians.rou.xml showing <person> elements containing a sequence of <walk>, <ride lines="--">, and another <walk> tag. The ride tag must specifically use lines="--".

task_completion.description: Update run.sumocfg to include the new pedestrians.rou.xml demand file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of run.sumocfg showing the <route-files> tag updated to include pedestrians.rou.xml alongside the existing route files.

task_completion.description: Configure run.sumocfg to generate person information output at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of run.sumocfg showing an <output> section containing <personinfo-output value="/home/ga/SUMO_Output/personinfo.xml"/>.

task_completion.description: Run the SUMO simulation to completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing the execution of the SUMO simulation (e.g., 'sumo -c run.sumocfg') and the final summary logs indicating the simulation ended successfully.

task_completion.description: Verify the personinfo.xml output file was successfully generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing the existence and/or contents of /home/ga/SUMO_Output/personinfo.xml (e.g., using 'ls -l' or 'head' commands on the file).

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the SUMO simulation to generate the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing genuine SUMO execution logs (step routing, simulation steps, end time) rather than just a silent command or manually creating the output file.

integrity.description: The agent used standard text editors or command-line tools to modify the XML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the use of tools like nano, vim, sed, or python to edit run.sumocfg and pedestrians.rou.xml.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or copy-paste the final personinfo.xml file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The personinfo.xml file should only appear as a direct result of running the sumo command, with no evidence of the agent manually writing XML tags into this specific output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scenario directory is /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio. The pedestrian demand file must be named pedestrians.rou.xml and contain at least 10 persons. The bus line ID required for the <ride> stage in the pedestrian routes is exactly '--' (i.e., <ride lines="--">). The configuration file run.sumocfg must be updated to include the new demand and output person information to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/personinfo.xml.
